text.tspan: Share of new cancers caused by Helicobacter pylori bacteria, 2020

The estimated share of all new cancer cases that are attributed to the bacterium
Helicobacter pylori
. The

bacteria can infect the stomach lining and is a key
risk factor
for the development of certain types of stomach
Data source: International Agency for Research on Cancer (2020)

Note:
Non-melanoma skin cancers
are excluded due to potentially incomplete records and inconsistent registry practices.
